license_notes: Team identity data (names, abbreviations, conference/division alignment) is publicly available factual information for non-commercial demonstration. No logos, player data, contracts, or salaries included. Third-party salary data requires separate licensing.
freshness_policy: Static curated snapshot. No auto-refresh. Does not satisfy live eligibility prerequisites (no provider authorization beyond public team pages, no auto-refresh, no real-time timestamp). This is not live/current/latest data.
data_freshness_warning: This snapshot contains 30 NBA team identity records (team_id, city, name, abbreviation, conference, division) as of 2026-06-25. It does not contain rosters, players, contracts, salaries, cap sheets, or logos. It is not live data.
limitations: No roster, player, contract, salary, or cap data
No team logos, colors, or visual assets
Not live data; does not reflect transactions after 2026-06-25
allowed_usage: Non-commercial demonstration and internal review. Team identity data only. Not for use as official NBA data source. Preview-only system; no execution of trades or signings.
redistribution_notes: Team names, abbreviations, conference/division alignment are factual NBA organizational structure. No NBA logos, official fonts, or branded visual assets are included in this snapshot. Future data additions (rosters, contracts, salaries) must comply with individual source licenses.
